description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3 Docker image and defines a single stage named deploy. Add a deploy job that runs only for tag pipelines, executes pip install -U twine setuptools wheel, then builds a binary wheel with python setup.py bdist_wheel, and finally uploads the distribution to PyPI using twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASS dist/*. The job should be placed in the deploy stage and no caches or artifacts are needed.
